ItacPersonItem.Notes: This is probably the same Soranzo ambassador to London, Paris, and Constantinople, adversary of the Jesuits, one of the patrons of the Incogniti, and defensor of Pallavicino in 1642. See Infelise, ‘La crise de la librairie vénetienne. 1620-1650’, in Le livre et l’historien. Le livre et l`historien : etudes offertes en l`honneur du Professeur Henri-Jean Martin / reunies par Frederic Barbier [et al], Géneve, Droz, 1997.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
